title: Uruguayan Keto Fish Fry
description: A keto twist on traditional Uruguayan cuisine, this fish fry is both delicious and healthy.

ingredients.name: White Fish (such as Cod or Tilapia)

instructions: 2. Season the fish with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the red bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the fish to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side.
6. Transfer the fish to a baking dish and top with fermented shredded cheese and gooey cheddar cheese.
7. Bake in the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
8. Serve immediately with Uruguayan-style soy sauce on the side.
